productDisplayName: Doodle Girl Be Born Pink Tops
description: Composition Pink top made of 100% cotton, with a round neck, pleated magyar sleeves, flap with metallic eyelets on the left shoulder and graphic print on the front Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash in cold water with like colours in a delicate cycle Do not bleach Tumble dry low or lay flat to dry Warm iron when needed Do not iron on print Let your little princess dance away to glory in this cute top from the Bee Born collection of doodle. The graphic print adds an element of sweetness and flaunts all her little playmates, while the cotton fabric keeps her fresh and comfortable all day. Pair this top with a shorts or skirts and sandals to complete her look.
